description: Cyan-on-dark with saturated glow shadows. Generic sci-fi HUD aesthetic — frequently produced for 'modern dashboard' or 'AI tool' briefs.
avoid_reasoning: Single most recognisable AI-default signature: #06B6D4 text + #111827 background + `shadow-cyan-500/50`. Reads as 'I don't know what aesthetic to use, so cyberpunk'. Valid for actual sci-fi or gaming briefs; always wrong as a default.

images.caption: Dashboard with cyan accent lines on gray-900 background
AI tool landing page with glowing cyan CTA
'Modern' analytics page with cyan gradient hero
